---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or behavior for asyncraft
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

Describe the problem you are trying to solve.

## Proposed solution

What change would help? Include API shape if possible.

## Alternative approaches

List alternatives you considered and why they are not enough.

## Use cases

Who benefits from this feature and in what scenario?

## Scope / impact

- [ ] New public API
- [ ] Behavior change
- [ ] Documentation-only improvement
- [ ] Performance / ergonomics

## Additional context

Add links, related issues, or sample code.

## Checklist

- [ ] Problem is scoped and reproducible if relevant.
- [ ] I included expected impact on users.
- [ ] I checked whether behavior can be implemented without a public API change.
